Why Choose Anmol Shine?

Quality, trust and performance — the Anmol Enterprises promise

🏭
Own Manufacturing
Made & packed in-house at our Kanpur factory for consistent, reliable quality every batch.
✅
Non-Alcoholic Range
Safer for workers — non-alcoholic formulations across all product lines without compromising performance.
📦
Multiple Pack Sizes
From 100ml trial packs to 20-litre bulk containers. Right size for every buyer — retail to wholesale.
🏅
Registered Brand
Trademark No. 03997952 — a legally protected, trusted name in industrial thinners.
🔧
Wide Applications
Products for automotive, wood, NC lacquer, polish, enamels, putty, surfacer and more.
📞
Dedicated Support
Always available on call and WhatsApp for orders, queries and technical guidance.
